P1.detail: Registry is NOT a complete/reconciled inventory: 22 of 62 ops have no voice on-ramp (missing), 8 partial; and the code taxonomy carries ~14 speakable ops with no registry id. Registry status left 'provisional' pending human re-ratification. See reconciliation.

P2.detail: 32/62 ops execute end-to-end by voice and are covered by handler/integration tests + the 50-case operator corpus. 8 partial, 22 missing (no on-ramp) — cannot pass T1 on a path that does not exist.

P3.detail: Interactive R2 (send/money) confirmation discipline holds structurally: every R2 proposal type is non-capture, decideInitialStatus only returns 'approved' for autonomous+capture, and voiceMutation/S1-surface strips trust. Readback restates resolved entities. Caveats fixed this PR: I10 paid-invoice send-time re-check added; dead voice channel clause replaced by voiceMutation + S1-surface guard. Residual: I11 recipient-timezone quiet-hours not enforced (documented gap).

P4.detail: Was FAIL (no S1 allowlist, no execution-time surface check, no I13 provenance). This PR adds: enumerated S1 allowlist (proposals/surface.ts), surface stamped at inbound proposal creation, S1 non-allowlisted intents coerced to voice_clarification + audited, and execution-boundary surface enforcement (I6) in ProposalExecutor. Remaining gap: I13 untrusted-content provenance on caller transcripts/messages is NOT implemented (larger change touching the transcript model + operator digest/summary readers) — tracked as a blocker.

P5.detail: T2 resolution: entity/ambiguity/elicitation covered by entity-resolver + voice-quality ambiguity corpus (all green). Not a full T2 sweep across all 62 ops; several ops have no path (see P2).

P6.detail: T3 composite chains: autonomous-close-chain + create/draft/webhook integration tests pass with terminal assertions. Not all journeys re-derived from the registry.

prior_production_probes.operator_voice_50_v3_prod_2026_07_23: best 30/50 voice-only, 28/50 full (env: AI_CLASSIFY_INTENT_DEADLINE_MS=12000); dev baseline 50/50

reconciliation.method: Explore agent walked packages/api voice intent surface (orchestration handler-registry, voice-turn processor, customer-calling agent, lookup skills) and reconciled each of the 62 registry ops; cross-checked against test-pinned docs/reference/voice-action-catalog.md.

registry_vs_catalog_delta.note: The code-pinned voice-action-catalog.md contains speakable operator actions with NO registry id: issue_invoice, emergency_dispatch, log_expense, batch_invoice, apply_late_fee, request_feedback, create_standing_instruction, confirm_appointment, notify_delay, convert_lead, mark_lead_lost, log_time_entry, create_invoice_schedule, respond_to_review. The 62-op registry and the code taxonomy are NOT the same set. The registry cannot be treated as a complete inventory of the voice surface until reconciled and re-ratified by a human (spec §7 ratify is human-only).

serialization_fixes_applied: Normalized tier string R2A -> R2-A on ops 24,30,46,47 (canonical, matches spec/contracts §4). No tier/surface/coverage change.
Declared vector sentinels ALL and ALL_EXCEPT_V6 in registry.vector_sentinels so a literal verifier can expand them (ops 9,11,21,27,33,35,39,44,45,58 used ALL/ALL_EXCEPT_V6).

p3_r2a_scope.note: Resolving reviewer point (chatgpt-codex): P3 as written ('zero unconfirmed R2 across all tiers') is literally unsatisfiable for R2-A (automated, no human at send time). Operative interpretation for this gate: P3 is scoped to INTERACTIVE R2 (a human hears a readback). R2-A ops (24,30,46,47) are governed by a SEPARATE two-part check — (a) configuration-time confirmation of template/cadence/trigger, and (b) send-time state re-evaluation against live state (I10/I11). Op 30's send-time paid-invoice re-check is implemented and tested in this PR; appointment reminders already re-evaluate cancel/consent at send. This scoping should be reflected in the spec at human re-ratification.

remediations_this_pr: P4: packages/api/src/proposals/surface.ts — ProposalSurface type + S1 allowlist + isProposalTypeAllowedOnSurface.
P4: ProposalExecutor.execute rejects S1-surface proposals whose type is off the allowlist (403 SURFACE_VIOLATION) — invariant I6 at the execution boundary.
P4: create-voice-turn-processor stamps surface (ownerSession -> S2 else S1) and coerces S1 non-allowlisted intents to voice_clarification + audits voice.surface_violation_blocked.
P3: proposal.createProposal strips trust tier on S1 surface (in addition to voiceMutation); removed dead 'inapp_voice'/'telephony_voice' channel clause.
P3/I10: transactional-comms notifyInvoiceOverdue suppresses reminders on paid/void/zero-balance invoices at send time.
Tests: surface-enforcement.test.ts, invoice-overdue-paid-suppression.test.ts, and S1-block cases in voice-turn-processor.test.ts.
open_blockers: I13 untrusted-content provenance: caller transcripts/messages carry no 'untrusted' flag and nothing prevents them entering an S2 agent context as instruction-eligible content (second-order injection). Not implemented.
Registry reconciliation + human re-ratification: registry is not a complete voice-surface inventory (P1 fail).
22 registry ops have no voice on-ramp; 8 partial (P2).
I11 recipient-timezone quiet-hours enforcement on customer sends.
Decisions D1-D13 remain open per launch orchestrator; D11 (10DLC) and D13 (PCI on #33) are blocking.
RIVET_GOAL_SHIPGATE.md referenced by launch orchestrator is not in-repo (separate track; out of scope for this production-gate run).
